title: #### C. ::ET4L — Creative Studio / Music Label
content:
#### C. ::ET4L — Creative Studio / Music Label
- **Type:** Project Container (Business + Studio + Label)
- **Role:** Umbrella house for:
- Music projects (e.g., ::ETCETER4, ::LOCREANCE)
- Collaborative or guest artist work
- Future non-music projects (film, installations, mixed media)

- **Status:** A division of AJP.MECA.ARTS
- **Business Use:** Label, production hub, creative collective, licensing portal

---

### II. | RELATIONSHIP TREE (Simple Flow)

```text
::4_bl00m
├── Spawns => ::ETCETER4 (music self)
├── Spawns => ::GR1ND3R, ::Q_v33R, ::MET4morfoses, etc.
